heading: Fee for use of diplomatic reception rooms
label: 2726 Fee for use of diplomatic reception rooms
text: The Secretary, acting through the Under Secretary for Management, is authorized to charge a fee for use of the diplomatic reception rooms of the Department of State. Amounts collected under this section (including reimbursements and surcharges) shall be deposited as an offsetting collection to any Department of State appropriation to recover the costs of such use and shall remain available for obligation until expended.
notes: Amendments2025— substituted “The Secretary, acting through the Under Secretary for Management,” for “The Secretary”.Pub. L. 119–60
